name: Nith Saovdi
tagline: Growing greener spaces through plant care, gardening, and sustainable horticulture.
availability: Open to landscaping and horticulture opportunities
bio: A 23-year-old Agricultural Science student with practical experience in landscape gardening, plant care, and sustainable horticulture. Skilled in garden maintenance, plant installation, and outdoor operations, with a strong commitment to teamwork, quality workmanship, and continuous learning.
